intro.title: Silly Big Personality Test - a purely funny personality test that parodies the MBTI
intro.subtitle: It has zero scientific basis and focuses on self-deprecation and show-off.
intro.secondary: Go directly to the test page
credits: This is purely for entertainment, please do not climb.

test.incompleteHint: It will be released only after all selections have been made. The world is messy enough, at least complete the questions.
test.completeHint: All done. Now you can put your electronic soul to the results page for judgment.

result.analysisTitle: A simple interpretation of the personality
result.regularNote: This test is for entertainment only. Do not use it as a diagnosis, interview, blind date, breakup, spiritualism, fortune telling or life judgment. You can laugh, but don't take it too seriously.
result.specialNote: This test is for entertainment purposes only. Hiding personality and being silly are all deliberate mistakes made by the author. Please do not regard it as a basis for medicine, psychology, physiognomy, numerology or paranormal science.
authorParagraphs: This test was first published by Maggot Rouerchuaner (UID417038183), the up owner of station b. The original intention was to persuade a friend who loves drinking to stop drinking.
Since the author's personality is that of a SHIT cynic, he attacked everyone equally, so I apologize. But I am a stunning beauty, you will definitely forgive me.
Regarding this test, I can't balance entertainment and professionalism well, so the interpretation of some personalities is vague or completely inaccurate. I'm sorry if any offense is caused.
In view of the limited time and energy, I just made one and played with it first. I will gradually improve and modify it later. In short, it is mainly fun, please do not use it for profit.
result.hiddenOverrideBadge: Match level 100% · Alcohol abnormality factor has taken over
result.hiddenOverrideSub: The affinity for ethanol is too strong, and the system has directly skipped the regular personality trial.
result.fallbackBadgePattern: The highest matching standard personality database is only {similarity}%
result.fallbackSub: The standard personality library collectively went on strike against your brain circuits, so the system forcibly assigned you to HHHH.
result.regularSub: The dimension hit rate is high, and the current result can be regarded as your first personality portrait.

A3.name: A3 Sense of meaning in life

S1.L: He attacks himself more harshly than others, and you want to verify the authenticity of every compliment he says to you.
S1.M: The self-confidence value fluctuates with the weather. It can fly with the wind and shrink first against the wind.
S1.H: I have a general idea of ​​myself in my heart and am unlikely to be distracted by a passerby’s words.

S2.L: There are a lot of snowflakes in the inner channel, and they are often cached in a loop in "Who Am I".
S2.M: I can still recognize myself at ordinary times, but occasionally I am temporarily changed by my emotions.
S2.H: You have a clear understanding of your own temper, desires and bottom line.

S3.L: If you care more about comfort and safety, there is no need to rush into life every day.
S3.M: I want to make progress, but also want to relax for a while, and I often hold internal meetings on value ranking.
S3.H: It’s easy to be pushed forward by goals, growth, or some important belief.

E1.L: The alarm in love is so sensitive that even if you can’t read it back, you can still imagine the ending.
E1.M: Half trusting, half testing, there is always a tug of war in the heart.
E1.H: I prefer to believe in the relationship itself and not be scared away by the slightest disturbance.

E2.L: Emotional investment tends to be restrained. It’s not that the door to the heart is not open, but that the door is too tightly guarded.
E2.M: You will be committed, but you will give yourself a backup plan, so that you will not go all out.
E2.H: Once identified, it is easy to be serious and full of emotions and energy.

E3.L: It is easy to be clingy and easy to be clingy. The sense of warmth in a relationship is very important.
E3.M: It requires a little bit of intimacy and independence, and is an adjustable type of dependence.
E3.H: The sense of space is very important. No matter how much you love, you must leave a piece of land of your own.

A1.L: Look at the world with its own defensive filter. Be suspicious first, then get closer.
A1.M: Neither naive nor outright conspiracy theorist, it’s your instinct to wait and see.
A1.H: I am more willing to believe in human nature and goodwill, and not rush to sentence the world to death when trouble comes.

A2.L: The rules can be circumvented, and comfort and freedom often come first.
A2.M: Be defensive when you need to be defensive, and don’t be stubborn when you need to be flexible.
A2.H: I have a strong sense of order and I don’t like to improvise if I can follow the process.

A3.L: The sense of meaning is low, and it is easy to feel that many things are just going through the motions.
A3.M: Sometimes I have goals, sometimes I want to fail, and my outlook on life is half-activated.
A3.H: You have more direction in doing things and know roughly where you want to go.

Ac1.L: Think in advance and don't overturn. The avoidance system is activated before ambition.
Ac1.M: Sometimes I want to win, sometimes I just want to stay out of trouble, the motivations are mixed.
Ac1.H: More likely to be ignited by a sense of achievement, growth, and advancement.

Ac2.L: It’s easy to turn around a few times before making a decision, and mental meetings often times out.
Ac2.M: I will think about it, but I won’t think about it. It’s a normal hesitation.
Ac2.H: He is quick to make decisions and does not like to look back after making a decision.

Ac3.L: There is a deep relationship between execution and the dead line, and the later it gets, the more likely it is that it will wake up.
Ac3.M: It can be done, but the state depends on the timing, sometimes it is stable and sometimes it is unstable.
Ac3.H: The desire to push forward is relatively strong, and it feels like there is a thorn in my heart if things don't fall into place.

So1.L: Social networking is slow to start, and taking the initiative usually takes a while.
So1.M: If someone comes, you will be picked up, and if no one comes, you will not be forced to do so. Social flexibility is average.
So1.H: I am more willing to take the initiative to open up the scene, and I am not afraid of showing my face in the crowd.

So2.L: In a relationship, you want to be close and integrated, and when you get acquainted, it is easy to put people into the inner circle.
So2.M: I want to be close but also want to leave gaps. The sense of boundary depends on the object.
So2.H: She has a strong sense of boundaries and will instinctively take half a step back if she gets too close.

So3.L: The expression is more direct, and I basically don’t like to dwell on what’s on my mind.
So3.M: You can speak according to the atmosphere, and usually leave a little bit of each in truth and decency.
So3.H: Be more proficient in self-switching between different scenes, and the sense of reality will be distributed in layers.

meta.description: Take the SBTI personality test to discover your absurd personality type. Share your result with friends and enjoy being accurately roasted.
meta.title: SBTI Personality Test —— Free Funny Personality Test

intro.heroTitle: SBTI Personality Test —— Free Funny Personality Test
intro.heroSubtitle: Take the SBTI personality test to discover your absurd personality type. Share your result with friends and enjoy being accurately roasted.
intro.whatIsTitle: What is the SBTI personality test?
intro.whatIsBody: The SBTI personality test (Silly Big Personality Test) is a free, joke-first parody of MBTI. Unlike traditional MBTI tests, the SBTI test has zero scientific basis — it is built for self-deprecation, humor, and easy sharing.
intro.mbtiRelationTitle: How is SBTI related to MBTI?
intro.mbtiRelationBody: SBTI is a funny parody version of MBTI. If you think MBTI tests are too serious, the SBTI test gives you the same "answer questions → get a result" experience, but the results are more absurd and more shareable. In short: SBTI is the funny alternative to MBTI.
intro.whyTestBody: No reason needed — just for fun. The SBTI personality test results are uncomfortably accurate, perfect for screenshots and sharing. Best of all: the SBTI test is completely free, no sign-up required.
intro.suitableTitle: Who is the SBTI test for?
intro.suitableBody: Anyone looking for a light, funny personality test. Whether you are an MBTI veteran wanting something different, or a newcomer to personality tests, the SBTI personality test delivers a fun result in minutes.
intro.aboutCta: Learn more about the SBTI test

testIntro.heading: SBTI Personality Test
testIntro.description: Start the free SBTI personality test and discover your funny personality type. SBTI is a joke-first MBTI parody — no science, just self-deprecating humor. Share your result with friends.
testIntro.mbtiNote: Unlike MBTI, the SBTI personality test does not aim for accuracy — but the results might hit closer to home than you expect.

types.typesDescription: Each type has its own setup, traits, and full result breakdown. If you want the complete list, you can browse all SBTI personality types here.
types.viewDetails: See this SBTI personality test result

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
items: The SBTI test is a joke-first personality quiz and an SBTI personality test built for satire, self-mockery, and easy sharing. If MBTI feels too serious, this version keeps the format but makes it funnier.
The SBTI test can feel uncomfortably familiar, but it is still a joke-first SBTI personality test. Treat the result as satire and self-observation, not as a serious decision tool.
How long does the SBTI test take?
The SBTI test usually takes about as long as a coffee break. This SBTI personality test has no time limit, so first instinct answers are enough.
Why does the SBTI test question order change?
The SBTI test changes question order between runs, and special prompts can appear in the middle. That makes each SBTI personality test attempt feel a little different.
What if my SBTI result is terrible?
If your SBTI test result looks terrible, that is part of the joke. This SBTI personality test is built for entertainment, so sharing the result is usually the right move.
Why does the SBTI test have hidden types?
Some SBTI test answer paths can trigger a hidden result or fallback result. That is part of what makes the SBTI personality test more replayable.

questions.text: I'm not just a loser. I'm also a clown and a washed-up nobody. I've never been in a relationship, I'm timid and insecure, and my youth has been one long string of fantasies. Every day I imagine having a girl to stroll around with, shop with, and hang out with. In reality, I've burned through my parents' money, gone to a lousy school, drifted through life, and ended up a directionless, talentless nobody. Every time I see people joking online about losers like me, I want to cry. I'm like a rat underground, peeking through a sewer grate at all the good things up on the surface. Every time I see that, it hurts and makes my world feel even smaller. Please, man, leave a little room for clowns like us to breathe. I really don't want to soak my pillow with tears in broad daylight.
I'm not good enough. The people around me are all better than I am.
I know very clearly what my real self is like.
Deep down, I do have things I genuinely want.
I have to keep climbing and become stronger.
I genuinely don't give a damn what outsiders think of me.
Your partner hasn't replied for over five hours and says they had diarrhea. What's your first thought?

options.label: It's impossible to have diarrhea for 5 hours, maybe he hid it from me.
Maybe he really doesn't feel well today.

questions.text: In relationships, I often worry that the other person will leave me.
I swear to heaven: I take every relationship seriously.

options.label: Yes! (With a clear conscience and a proud face)

questions.text: Your partner is respectful, gentle, self-disciplined, upright, eloquent, observant, knowledgeable, patient, kind, approachable, ambitious, radiant, and absurdly gorgeous. What would you do?

options.label: No matter how good he is, I won't fall into it too deep.
It will be between A and C.
I will cherish her very much and may become a love brain.

questions.text: After you start dating, your partner turns out to be extremely clingy. How do you feel?

options.label: I prefer to keep my own space

questions.text: I care a lot about personal space in any relationship.

options.label: I prefer to rely on and be dependent on

questions.text: Most people are kind.

options.label: In fact, there are more evil people in the human heart than there are hemorrhoids in the world.
Yes, I want to believe that there are more good people.

questions.text: You're walking down the street when an adorable little girl bounces over to you. She looks cute from the front, from the side, and even on camera. She hands you a lollipop. What goes through your mind?

options.label: Wow, she's so nice and cute! You actually gave me a lollipop!
Maybe this is a new type of scam? It's better to go away.

questions.text: Exams are coming up, and the school requires evening self-study. Taking leave will cost you points. But tonight you've made plans with your crush to play PUBG Mobile. What do you do?

options.label: The exam is almost here, why go there?

questions.text: I like breaking convention and hate being constrained.
I usually do things with a goal in mind.

Then one day it hits me: what the hell is the meaning of life anyway? Humans are just animals driven by desire, basically ruled by hormones. Hungry, so we eat. Sleepy, so we sleep. In heat, so we want to mate. We're really not that different from pigs and dogs.
I mainly do things to achieve results and make progress, not just to avoid trouble and risk.
You're constipated, you've already been sitting on the toilet for 30 minutes, and you still can't go. Which option sounds more like you?

options.label: Sit for another thirty minutes and take a look, maybe it will be there.
Slap your butt hard and say: "Damn ass, pull it!"
When using Kaiserlu, pull it out quickly.

questions.text: I'm pretty decisive and don't like hesitating.
This question has no prompt. Just pick blindly.

options.label: After thinking about it again and again, I feel like I should choose A?

questions.text: When people say you're great at getting things done, which thought feels closer to the truth?

options.label: I was really strong in execution when I was pushed to the end.
Yes, things should have been moved forward

questions.text: I usually make plans before doing things, ____

options.label: But plans don't change as quickly as they do.
Sometimes it gets done, sometimes it doesn't.

questions.text: You met a bunch of online friends through Dead by Daylight (a pretty intense game), and now they've invited you to meet in real life. What's your reaction?

options.label: Even if we chatted online, I was still a little nervous in person.
It’s also nice to meet netizens. Anyway, I’ll chat with whoever comes.
I'd dress up and chat warmly, and what if, and I mean what if?

questions.text: A friend brings another friend along to hang out. What are you most likely to be like?

options.label: I naturally feel a bit distant from "friends of friends", and I am afraid that it will affect their relationship.
Look at each other and play if you can.
Friends of friends should also be considered my friends! Chat enthusiastically

questions.text: When it comes to dealing with people, I basically live inside an electronic fence. Get too close and the alarm goes off automatically.
I want to be very close with people I trust, close enough to feel like long-lost relatives.
Sometimes you clearly have a different, negative opinion about something, but you still don't say it. Most of the time, why?

options.label: It may be due to feelings or relationships.
I don't want others to know that I am a dark person.

questions.text: I show different versions of myself around different people.

specialQuestions.text: What hobbies do you usually have?

options.label: Enjoy a drink, don't drink too much.
I am used to pouring liquor into a thermos cup and drinking it as boiled water. I am convinced by the alcohol.

CTRL.intro: How about it, have you been manipulated by me?
CTRL.desc: Congratulations, you have detected the rarest personality. You are a natural rebel against the law of entropy increase in the universe! 99.99% of the so-called successful people in the world are your poor imitators. The CTRL personality is a walking humanoid self-propelled task manager. The "rules" in the eyes of ordinary people are just the basic parameter settings from the factory; the so-called "plans" to you are just random graffiti on a whim. What does it mean to have a CTRL friend? It means that your life navigation system will become more accurate and efficient. Because CTRL knows best. CTRL will use "Ctrl+S" to help you hard-core save the second before your life train is about to derail, and then use a set of irresistible logic to force you back on track. They are the last backup disks of your chaotic life, the only reset button that is still on before the universe collapses.

ATM-er.desc: Congratulations, you have discovered the rarest personality in the world. You may become an unsolved mystery in the financial world - yes, the ATM-er may not actually "send money", but he may always be "paying". Pay for your time, pay for your energy, pay for your patience, and pay for a night that should be peaceful. Therefore, like an old but sturdy ATM machine, what is inserted is other people's anxieties and troubles, and what is spit out is the reassurance of "It's okay, I'm here". Your life is one big, one-man-pay show that no one cheers for. You have withstood the waterfall-like demands with rock-like reliability. Occasionally, in the dead of night, you will sigh at the bill-maybe mentally: My damn sense of responsibility has nowhere to put it.

Dior-s.intro: Waiting for my dick to counterattack.
Dior-s.desc: Congratulations! You are not a diaosi, you are the long-lost spiritual descendant of the cynic sage Diogenes, because the full name of diaosi is Diogenes' Original Realist - sage. Dior-s personality is the most thorough disdain for the traps of contemporary consumerism and PUA. It's not that they "don't seek advancement," but they have already seen through that the end of all "improvement" is nothing more than a higher-level prison cell. Diaosi has great wisdom. While others are chasing the wind and being beaten to pieces by the huge waves of the times, Dior-s has long been basking in the sun in his own spiritual barrel, reaching the supreme state of "one person and one barrel". What they believe in is not empty talk, but physical laws and biological instincts that have been tested hundreds of millions of times in practice: 1. Lying down is more comfortable than standing; 2. When meal time arrives, you must cook.

BOSS.intro: Give me the steering wheel and I'll drive.
BOSS.desc: BOSS is a person who always holds the steering wheel in his hand. Even if the fuel tank has a red light, even if the navigation is talking nonsense, you will say expressionlessly: I will drive. Then we actually drove the car to our destination. This personality has an independent physical law - the eternal upward law. The BOSS personality looks at the world like a player who has completed the game looking at a novice tutorial. Efficiency is their religion, order is their breath. They do not "bring their own leadership aura", they are themselves human-shaped aura generators. The air within a radius of five meters will automatically become serious and efficient. "Self-breakthrough" in their eyes is roughly equivalent to "self-abuse" in the eyes of ordinary people. Master a new language today, take a professional certificate tomorrow, and plan to colonize Mars the day after tomorrow. If you say it's too curly, he will look at you like a weakling: It's not that I'm too harsh, it's that you're too loose.

THAN-K.intro: I thank heaven! I thank the earth!
THAN-K.desc: Congratulations, you have tested the rarest personality. You should thank me! Thank you for having the nourishment of life at this moment! What if you are stuck in traffic on your way to work? You should also say: I am grateful for this traffic jam. It gives me more time to listen to this beautiful song and appreciate every face twisted with anxiety outside the window, which makes me cherish my inner peace more. Yes, THAN-K has a gentle personality and an open mind. In their eyes, there are no completely bad people in the world, only "friends who have not yet been illuminated by the light of gratitude." Having a THAN-K friend is like having an inexhaustible positive energy tower around you. TA can even help you discover a Van Gogh-style starry sky picture from the mold in the corner.

OH-NO.intro: Oh no! How come I have this personality?
OH-NO.desc: "Oh no!" is not a scream of fear, but of supreme wisdom. When ordinary people see a cup placed on the edge of the table, what they see is a disaster epic consisting of "water damage-short circuit-fire-evacuation of the whole building-economic losses-butterfly effect-the end of the world". So, with a cry of Oh, no! from the depths of their souls, they will move the cup to the center of the table at lightning speed, and then put an absorbent coaster on it. Oh, no one has an almost paranoid respect for "boundaries": What's yours is yours, and what's mine is mine. All accidents and risks have been nipped in the bud with his "Oh, no!" They are the patron saints of order, the last decent people with straight nerves in a chaotic world.

GOGO.desc: Research has found that the brain structure of GOGO personality is fundamentally different from that of ordinary people. GOGO lives in an ultimate "what you see is what you get" world, and its life creed is so simple and brutal: as long as I close my eyes, it will be dark; as long as I spend all my money, I have no money; as long as I stand on the zebra crossing, I am now a pedestrian. The logic is perfectly closed and cannot be refuted at all. While others are still debating "which came first, the chicken or the egg", GOGO Walker has put the chicken and eggs together into a plate of "chicken lays eggs, eggs lays chicken - the ultimate secret of rice bowl". They're not "solving the problem," they're "clearing the to-do list." For them, there are only two states in the world: completed and about to be completed by me.

SEXY.desc: When you walk into a room, the lighting system automatically recognizes you as a natural beauty and consciously dims the brightness to avoid wasting energy. When you smile, you become a smiling beauty, and the humidity of the surrounding air will drop significantly, because the water vapor condenses into love in people's eyes. No matter who you are, it is easy for you to pay attention to your presence. Legend has it that if enough SEXY personalities gather together for a party, the combined charm energy released is enough to temporarily distort the structure of time and space, giving participants the happy illusion that "time has slowed down." They don't need to work hard to express themselves. Many times, the mere existence itself is like an excessively gorgeous poem.

LOVE-R.intro: Too much love makes reality seem a bit barren.
LOVE-R.desc: The LOVE-R personality is like a rare species that has survived to this day from ancient mythological times. Its probability of existence is lower than the probability of catching the author's arm in the toilet. You are simply the last and most anachronistic bard of this Iron Forest Age. Because your emotional processor is not binary, it's rainbow. A fallen leaf, in the eyes of ordinary people, is just "autumn is coming", but in the eyes of LOVE-R, it is a tragic comedy in thirteen acts about reincarnation, sacrifice and wordless love. Your inner world is like a theme park that never closes. You spend your whole life looking for that soul mate who can understand the park map and is willing to ride the merry-go-round with you to the end of the universe.

MUM.desc: Congratulations, you have tested out the rarest mother personality. Yes, before chaos began, before time had a name, before the first star burped its first burp, there was a mother. The background of my mother's personality is gentleness, she is good at sensing emotions, has super empathy, and knows when to stop and when to say "forget it" to herself. Mom is like a doctor, curing other people's unhappiness. It's a pity that when her mother sheds tears, the dose of medicine she gives herself is always smaller than that given to others. MUM often discounts her tenderness.

FAKE.intro: Already, there are no more humans.
FAKE.desc: SCP Foundation Urgent Report: Item Number SCP-CN-████ "Pseudoman". In social situations, pseudo-persons are versatile beings because they can switch personas faster than they can switch input methods on their mobile phones. One second he was still in the loyal buddy mode, and the next second the leader came and he instantly switched to the calm, reliable and good employee mode, even the gloss and curl on his face were fine-tuned. Do you think you have made a friend who really understands you? Wake up. You are just lucky enough to meet an android who is good at disguise and has high performance. In the dead of night, the dummy took off the masks layer by layer, and finally discovered that there was a lot of space under the mask, and it was these masks that made up himself.

OJBK.intro: When I say casual, I really mean casual.
OJBK.desc: Let’s face the crude nature of the word: OJBK. This is no longer a personality, but a governing philosophy. When ordinary people are faced with the century-old decision of "rice or noodles for lunch", their brains are burning calories intensely; and the OJBK personality, with a calmness like a review memorial, will lightly spit out two words: Either way. This is not to say that I have no opinion, this is to tell you: to me, all of your mundane choices are just ants. Why not argue? Because there is no point in debating the future of the universe with a paramecium. Why not be more serious? Because the emperor doesn't care whether the dust under his feet drifts to the left or to the right.

MALO.intro: Life is a copy, and I am just one.
MALO.desc: My friend, you are not a "child at heart", you have not evolved at all. Your soul is still stuck in that happy era when you were hanging on a tree and swinging, and your eyes lit up when you saw a banana. When human ancestors decided to come down from the trees, learn to walk upright, and put on suits and ties, their ancestors looked at them from the nearby tree, scratched their buttocks, and let out a disdainful "squeak". They have seen through everything: the so-called "civilization" is nothing more than the most boring and least fun paid game. Rules are occasionally broken, ceilings are made for hanging upside down, and conference rooms are made for performing backflips. MALO itself is a fantastic idea that fell out of a huge brain and forgot to close the door.

JOKE-R.intro: It turns out we are all clowns.
JOKE-R.desc: Please note that the JOKE-R personality is not a "person", but more like a clown who wears jokes on his body. You open one layer, it's a joke; you open another layer, it's a joke; you open it layer by layer, until finally, you find that the innermost part. is empty, with only a faint echo left saying: Ha, didn't expect it. JOKE-R is the leader of the atmosphere team and the only designated firepower output in social situations. With them here, the place won't be cold. Everyone was laughing up and down, and the ones who laughed the happiest were often themselves - using the loudest laughter to cover up the sound of heartbreak.

WOC!.intro: Damn it, why do I have this personality?
WOC!.desc: We discovered a magical creature - WOC! Man. They have two completely independent operating systems: one is called the "surface system", which is responsible for making a series of fussy onomatopoeias such as "Holy shit", "awesome", "ah?" and so on; the other is called the "backend system", which is responsible for calm analysis: Well, it's just as I expected. WOC! People only know shit and don't mind their own business, because they know very well that trying to reason with idiots is like trying to climb up a wall with mud. It not only wastes energy but also makes you shit. So they chose to hold a straw of wisdom and give the highest respect to this crazy world with a soulful "WOC!"

THIN-K.desc: Research has found that the brain structure of THIN-K personality is fundamentally different from that of ordinary people. As the name suggests, your brain is in a thinking state for long periods of time. You are very good at judging information, paying attention to arguments, arguments, logical reasoning, potential biases, and even a complete set of materials such as the "investigation report on the author's ideological background within three generations". In this era of information explosion, you will never follow blindly easily, you will weigh the pros and cons in a relationship, and you will also defend your own space. Are you in a daze when others see you alone? Silly, that's not being in a daze, that's your brain sorting, filing, and destroying all the information it received today.

SHIT.intro: This world is a pile of rocks.
SHIT.desc: Congratulations, the SHIT personality is the only rare personality known in the universe. The so-called shit is not complaining, but performing a mysterious ritual. SHIT's behavior pattern is an earth-shattering drama of paradox. Word of mouth: This project is shit. On hand: Open Excel silently and start constructing function models and Gantt charts. Word of mouth: These colleagues are all shit. On hand: After a colleague messed up, I was annoyed and stayed up late to clean up the mess. Saying: This world is a piece of shit, destroy it quickly. On hand: Get up on time at seven o'clock the next morning, get on the shitty subway, and go do that shitty job. Don't be afraid, that's not a doomsday warning, that's his charge that's about to start saving the world.

ZZZZ.intro: I'm not dead, I'm just sleeping.
ZZZZ.desc: Congratulations, you have tested out the rarest personality that pretends to be dead. You can turn a blind eye to the 99+ messages in the group, but when someone issues the ultimatum "@all members the deadline is half an hour away", you may slowly type "received" as if you just woke up from a thousand-year-old tomb, and then hand in a passing answer sheet within 29 minutes. Yes, until the only and highest-authority instruction of "death line" appears, you will really break out, and you will be a blockbuster. You're proving a truth to the universe: sometimes you can't do anything wrong by doing nothing at all.

POOR.intro: I am poor, but I am very professional.
POOR.desc: Congratulations, you have tested [POOR - poor person]. This "poverty" is not a verdict of wallet balance, but more like a redistribution of resources after giving up desires. Others spread their energy into QR codes all over the sky, but you compress your energy into a beam of laser light, and smoke will start wherever you shine it. The world of POOR is very simple: reduce noise on unimportant things, and work hard on important things to the end. Busy, social, vanity, and a sense of presence everywhere? Sorry, not available. It’s not that you have few resources, you pour them all into a pit, so it looks like poverty, but in fact it looks like a mine. Once you decide something is worth pursuing, no matter how noisy the outside world is, it is just background noise.

MONK.desc: While others comprehend the entanglement of love and hate in KTV, MONK personality chooses to comprehend the great truth at home. MONK has seen through the world of mortals, and does not want idlers to disturb his pure practice and disrupt his path. MONK's personal space is their boundary, their Mount Sumeru, their absolute domain, sacrosanct and inviolable. Those who step into it will feel a sense of suffocation from the depths of their souls. MONKs are neither clingy nor entangled, because in their world view, everything has its own independent trajectory. Planets are hundreds of millions of kilometers apart from each other to form a harmonious universe. Why not between people?

IMSB.intro: Seriously? Am I really a fool?
IMSB.desc: Congratulations! You are not in the human category at all! You have tested out the [IMSB] personality that comes only once in a million years. In the brain of the IMSB personality live two ultimate warriors who will never stop fighting: one is called "I fucking charged!" and the other is called "I am a fool!". When IMSB faces a person he likes, the former will say: Go for it! Go ask for WeChat! Go make a date! Love needs to be spoken loudly! The latter went on to say: Why do people like you? If you go there, you will be humiliating yourself! End result: stare at the other person’s back until they disappear, then take out your phone and search for “how to overcome social phobia.” IMSB isn't really stupid, it's just your inner drama, which is probably longer than all the movies in the Marvel Universe combined.

SOLO.intro: I cried, how could I be an orphan?
SOLO.desc: Congratulations, you have tested the rarest [SOLO - Orphan] personality. Don't cry in a hurry, the king's coronation ceremony is usually done alone. Orphans have a low sense of self-worth, so they sometimes take the initiative to alienate others. The orphans build a Great Wall around their souls called "Don't touch me." Every brick is a wound from the past. An orphan is like a hedgehog that hides all its weaknesses and then points its hardest thorn at the world. The spikes all over the body are not an attack, they are words that cannot be said: "Don't come over, I'm afraid you will be hurt too" and "Please, don't leave."

FUCK.intro: Hold! What kind of personality is this?
FUCK.desc: Congratulations! You are not in the human category at all! You have detected a once-in-a-million-year [FUCK] personality. In the civilized city of mankind, a humanoid weed with super vitality that cannot be killed by any herbicide has appeared - the personality of the Grasser. Its scientific name is FUCK. In FUCK's worldview, secular rules are simply meaningless, and FUCK's emotional switches are physical paddles: FUCK YEAH and FUCK OFF. FUCK not only pursues the immediate pleasure, but also pursues a kind of vitality that runs rampant in the body. When everyone has been domesticated into docile poultry, FUCK is the last wolf howl in the wilderness.

DEAD.desc: Congratulations, you have detected the rarest personality, but the name "Dead Man" is a bit unlucky, so you can also call it: Don't Expect Any Drives. The deceased had seen through the meaningless philosophical thinking and therefore seemed to have "lost" interest in everything. The dead looked at the world like a top player who had cleared all the main plots, side plots, and hidden missions. After deleting the game and restarting it 999 times, he finally discovered: this game is not interesting at all. The dead are the ultimate sages who transcend desires and goals. Their existence is the most silent and thorough protest against this noisy world.

IMFW.desc: Congratulations, what you tested is not an ordinary personality, you are an extremely rare one that only accounts for 0.0001% of the world's population - [waste]. The self-esteem of wastes is usually fragile, insecure, and occasionally lacking in assertiveness. Therefore, this kind of personality can accurately perceive the strongest WiFi signal around them-that is, the most reliable person in their hearts. Entering the life of the [Waste] personality is like entering a top-notch orchid greenhouse: it requires precise control of temperature and humidity, as well as the verbal photosynthesis of "I love you" at regular intervals every day. Give a piece of candy to a waste, and they will give you a shining look in their eyes that completely trusts you. You may not be a waste, you are just too unprepared and too easy to take yourself seriously.

HHHH.desc: Congratulations! Because your thinking circuit is too strange, the standard personality library has completely collapsed. When the first personality matching rate is less than 60%, the system will forcefully match this personality for you - [HHHH - Silly Musician]. What qualities does this personality have? Hahahahahahahahahahahaha! Sorry, that's all there is to it. You can view the fifteen dimensions for unprofessional assessment, I’m really sorry! The author did not consider everything when setting up the personality, so this situation occurred. Hahahahahaha. I laughed and cried. How could someone's brain circuit be so novel?

DRUNK.intro: The strong alcohol burned my throat and I had to get drunk.
DRUNK.desc: Why do you stagger when you walk? Why are you always in high spirits? Why do you see ghost images? Because what is flowing in your body is not blood, but delicious Wuliangye! It’s Guojiao 1573! It’s Jiang Xiaobai! It’s Shaanxi Wuliangye! Oh, delicious white wine, every drop is burning and boiling. Are you accustomed to pouring liquor into a thermos and drinking it as plain water? What a great white wine! It makes you talk and laugh at the dinner table, and confess your life while holding the toilet in the toilet; it makes you feel like a nightclub poet, the eternal fire in the center of the universe, until ten o'clock the next morning, your head looks like a cracked walnut, with food residue hanging from the corner of your mouth, and your soul shrinks in the corner. You finally understand that the person who was talking loudly and slamming the table and roaring last night has become an alcoholic.
